name: hyperformula
when_to_use: 需要一个真正的电子表格计算引擎——改一个单元格、依赖它的公式格按依赖图自动重算(what-if 预算模型、活电子表格、级联计算)时用它;它是无头引擎,只算不渲染,消费 AI 自己接 UI(可配目录里的 x-data-spreadsheet 网格)。目录里的 formulajs-formulajs 只是一堆孤立函数(无单元格引用、无重算),x-data-spreadsheet 只是纯 UI 表格(无公式引擎),都不是引擎层;非只需算几个独立公式的场景(那用 formulajs)。
why_valuable: AI 徒手实现"跨单元格引用 + 依赖图拓扑排序 + 增量重算 + 循环依赖检测 + 400+ 内置函数(SUM/VLOOKUP/IF/日期/文本…)"是一整套引擎工程,成功率近 0;HyperFormula 把这套 Excel 语义的计算内核固定下来,setCellContents 后依赖链自动重算,AI 只需拼二维数据 + 接 UI。

data_in.note: 喂二维数组 RawCellContent[][](行×列):普通值直接放 number|string|boolean|null,公式放以 '=' 开头的字符串(如 '=A1+B1'、'=SUM(A1:A3)'、'=VLOOKUP(...)'、'=IF(...)')。列/行用 0 基下标寻址 {sheet,col,row}(A1 = {sheet:0,col:0,row:0})。关键:v2.0.0+ 构建时必须在 config 传 licenseKey;开源 GPL 用途填 'gpl-v3'(实测 bundle 内接受该串),漏了会报 missing-license 警告。license 为 GPL-3.0-only(或向 Handsontable 购商用双授权),CDN 载入用户 artifact 前需告知 license 取向。

schema.sheet: RawCellContent[][] —— 单表二维数据;单元格 = number | string | boolean | null,公式为 '=' 开头字符串
schema.sheets?: { [sheetName: string]: RawCellContent[][] } —— buildFromSheets 的多表形态,默认单表用 sheet

config.licenseKey: string —— 必填;开源 GPL 用途填 'gpl-v3'

schema.updates?: Array<{ address: {sheet,col,row}, contents: RawCellContent[][] | RawCellContent }> —— 交互时用 setCellContents 触发自动重算,默认无(静态一次算)

provides._note: headless-primitive:纯计算内核,不渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;消费 AI 取 getSheetValues 后自行绘表。
provides.outputs: 按依赖图求值后的单元格值(getSheetValues → CellValue[][]、getCellValue → 单值);setCellContents 返回受影响单元格的 ExportedChange[],可据此局部刷新 UI;错误以 DetailedCellError(如 #DIV/0!、#REF!)形式落在对应单元格。

api_surface.build: HyperFormula.buildFromArray(sheet, config, namedExpressions?) → 实例;多表用 buildFromSheets(sheets, config);空表 buildEmpty(config)
api_surface.read: getCellValue({sheet,col,row}) 取单值;getSheetValues(sheetId) 取整表值;getAllSheetsValues() 取全部;getCellFormula(addr) 取原公式串
api_surface.mutate: setCellContents({sheet,col,row}, [['=B1*2']]) 写入并自动重算依赖链,返回 ExportedChange[]

peer.note: HyperFormula 只算不画;把 getSheetValues 的结果喂给 x-data-spreadsheet 这类纯 UI 网格渲染,单元格编辑回调再 setCellContents 触发重算,即成活电子表格。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a real spreadsheet calculation engine: change one cell and formulas that depend on it automatically recalculate through a dependency graph (what-if budgets, live spreadsheets, cascading calculations). It is a headless engine that calculates but does not render; connect your own UI, optionally using the catalog's x-data-spreadsheet grid. formulajs-formulajs is only a set of isolated functions (no cell references or recalculation), while x-data-spreadsheet is UI only (no formula engine), so neither replaces the engine layer. If you only need a few independent formulas, use formulajs.
en.why_valuable: Implementing cross-cell references, dependency-graph topological ordering, incremental recalculation, circular-reference detection, and 400+ built-in functions (SUM/VLOOKUP/IF/date/text, etc.) is an entire engine project with near-zero success from handwritten AI. HyperFormula fixes this Excel-semantic calculation core; after setCellContents, dependency chains recalculate automatically, so AI only needs to assemble 2D data and connect a UI.

data_in.note: Supply a 2D RawCellContent[][] array (rows x columns): put number|string|boolean|null values directly, and formulas in strings beginning with '=' (for example '=A1+B1', '=SUM(A1:A3)', '=VLOOKUP(...)', '=IF(...)'). Address rows and columns with zero-based {sheet,col,row} ({sheet:0,col:0,row:0} is A1). Important: since v2.0.0, construction requires licenseKey in config. For open-source GPL use, set it to 'gpl-v3' (verified as accepted by the bundle); omission produces a missing-license warning. The license is GPL-3.0-only, with a commercial dual license available from Handsontable, so disclose the license choice before loading the CDN into a user artifact.

schema.sheet: RawCellContent[][] -- single-sheet 2D data; cell = number | string | boolean | null, and formulas are strings beginning with '='
schema.sheets?: { [sheetName: string]: RawCellContent[][] } -- multi-sheet form for buildFromSheets; use sheet for a single sheet by default

config.licenseKey: string -- required; use 'gpl-v3' for open-source GPL use

schema.updates?: Array<{ address: {sheet,col,row}, contents: RawCellContent[][] | RawCellContent }> -- use setCellContents during interaction to trigger automatic recalculation; none by default (one static calculation)

boot.note: 构建时 licenseKey 必填,GPL 场景恒填 'gpl-v3'(实测有效);漏填只报警告不阻断但不规范。地址用 0 基 {sheet,col,row}(A1={sheet:0,col:0,row:0})。公式串必须以 '=' 起头,否则当纯文本。命名导入 { HyperFormula }。用完 destroy() 避免长会话内存累积。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr hyperformula@3.3.0 +esm (433KB): named export HyperFormula present (grep 'ae as HyperFormula', plus 'L as default'). Public API from typings/HyperFormula.d.ts — static buildFromArray(sheet, configInput?, namedExpressions?), buildFromSheets(sheets,...), buildEmpty(...); instance getCellValue(SimpleCellAddress), getSheetValues(sheetId): CellValue[][], getAllSheetsValues(), getCellFormula(addr), setCellContents(topLeftCornerAddress, RawCellContent[][]|RawCellContent) → ExportedChange[] — all match api_surface/boot. licenseKey: ConfigParams.d.ts declares required 'licenseKey: string'; the string 'gpl-v3' is present verbatim in the bundle (valid free GPL key; 'internal-use-in-handsontable' also present). Zero global footprint: grep over the 433KB bundle found 0 document.head/body/createElement/querySelector/addEventListener, 0 window.addEventListener, 0 customElements, 0 adoptedStyleSheets/insertRule — pure headless compute engine, trivially shadow-safe. Caveat: large (~433KB) engine — heavy but side-effect-free.
